question: Which NLP task types are reported for contributions that use the CoNLL-2003 dataset?
What natural languages are reported for datasets that are publicly available?
How many annotators are reported for contributions that make written guidelines public?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?numAnnotators WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181036 ?annotationScheme .
  ?annotationScheme orkgp:P181038 ?guidelineAvailability .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?guidelineAvailability)) = LCASE('yes'))
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181032 ?annotator .
  ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators .
}

question: In which year were papers published that report publicly available datasets?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
    orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:license ?license .
  ?license orkgp:P181026 ?publicAvailability .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?publicAvailability)) = LCASE('yes'))
}

question: Which evaluation metrics are used for contributions that employ cross-validation?
What license types are reported for implemented approaches released on GitHub?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT (COALESCE(?licenseTypeLabel, STR(?licenseType)) AS ?licenseTypeValue) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181046 ?approach .
  ?approach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?url)), 'github'))
  ?approach orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType .
  OPTIONAL { ?licenseType rdfs:label ?licenseTypeLabel . }
}

question: How many data sources are reported for datasets whose source domain includes information systems?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?numSources WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source .
  ?source orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  ?domain rdfs:label ?domainLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?domainLabel)) = LCASE('information systems'))
  ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources .
}

question: In which year were papers published that use the Reuters-21578 dataset?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
    orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset rdfs:label ?datasetLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?datasetLabel)) = LCASE('reuters-21578'))
}

question: Which algorithms are reported for implemented approaches that have documentation?

  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage .
  ?naturalLanguage rdfs:label ?naturalLanguageLabel .

}

question: Which data source types are reported for datasets that come from more than one source?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sourceType ?sourceTypeLabel WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source .
  ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources .
  FILTER(?numSources > 1)
  ?source orkgp:P181018 ?sourceType .
  OPTIONAL { ?sourceType rdfs:label ?sourceTypeLabel . }
}

question: What baseline comparison details are given for evaluations that report F1?
How many annotators are reported for annotation processes that resolve conflicts by discussion?

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?numAnnotators WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181041 ?annotatorAgreement .
  ?annotatorAgreement orkgp:P181044 ?conflictResolution .
  ?conflictResolution rdfs:label ?conflictResolutionLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?conflictResolutionLabel)), 'discussion'))
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181032 ?annotator .
  ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators .
}

question: What conflict resolution methods are reported for annotation processes that use Cohen's kappa?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT (COALESCE(?conflictResolutionLabel, STR(?conflictResolution)) AS ?conflictResolutionValue) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181041 ?annotatorAgreement .
  ?annotatorAgreement orkgp:P181042 ?reliabilityMetric ;
    orkgp:P181044 ?conflictResolution .
  ?reliabilityMetric rdfs:label ?reliabilityMetricLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reliabilityMetricLabel)), 'cohen'))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reliabilityMetricLabel)), 'kappa'))
  OPTIONAL { ?conflictResolution rdfs:label ?conflictResolutionLabel . }
}

  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181021 ?abstractionLevel .
  ?abstractionLevel rdfs:label ?abstractionLevelLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?abstractionLevelLabel)), 'token-level'))
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181032 ?annotator .
  ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators .
}

question: In which year were papers published that report cross-validation together with F1?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
    orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181050 ?validationProcedure ;
    orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  ?validationProcedure rdfs:label ?validationProcedureLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?validationProcedureLabel)) = LCASE('cross-validation'))
  ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)), 'f1'))
}

question: In which year were papers published that report a released tool and a baseline comparison?
Which baseline comparison types are reported for evaluations that use macro-F1?
What release URLs are given for implemented approaches that are released as source code?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?url WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181046 ?approach .
  ?approach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P181049 ?releaseFormat ;
    orkgp:P1003 ?url .
  ?releaseFormat rdfs:label ?releaseFormatLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?releaseFormatLabel)), 'source code'))
}

question: How many contributions report a baseline comparison and the metric accuracy?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?contribution) AS ?numContributions) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?evaluation .
  ?evaluation orkgp:P181051 ?baselineComparison ;
    orkgp:P110006 ?metric .
  ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel)) = LCASE('accuracy'))
}

question: Which documentation types are reported for implemented approaches that use neural networks?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT (COALESCE(?measuredAgreementLabel, STR(?measuredAgreement)) AS ?measuredAgreementValue) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181041 ?annotatorAgreement .
  ?annotatorAgreement orkgp:P181042 ?reliabilityMetric ;
    orkgp:P181045 ?measuredAgreement .
  ?reliabilityMetric rdfs:label ?reliabilityMetricLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reliabilityMetricLabel)), 'cohen'))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reliabilityMetricLabel)), 'kappa'))
  OPTIONAL { ?measuredAgreement rdfs:label ?measuredAgreementLabel . }
}

question: How many contributions report English as the natural language and a token-level data format?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?contribution) AS ?numContributions) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage ;
    orkgp:P181023 ?dataFormat .
  ?naturalLanguage rdfs:label ?naturalLanguageLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?naturalLanguageLabel)) = LCASE('english'))
  ?dataFormat rdfs:label ?dataFormatLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?dataFormatLabel)), 'token-level'))
}

question: In which year were papers published that report an annotation scheme established by consensus?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
    orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181036 ?annotationScheme .
  ?annotationScheme orkgp:P181037 ?establishment .
  ?establishment rdfs:label ?establishmentLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?establishmentLabel)), 'consensus'))
}

question: Which license types are reported for datasets stored in Zenodo?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?licenseType ?licenseTypeLabel WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset ;
    orkgp:license ?license .
  ?license orkgp:P181028 ?location .
  ?location orkgp:P181030 ?locationType .
  ?locationType rdfs:label ?locationTypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?locationTypeLabel)) = LCASE('zenodo'))
  ?license orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType .
  OPTIONAL { ?licenseType rdfs:label ?licenseTypeLabel . }
}

question: What dependency types are reported for implemented approaches that are released on GitHub?
